name: m180-peer-optional-fixture
description: Milestone 180 US4 fixture — root depends on some-lib; some-lib declares react as peer-optional. In the lockfile the react entry carries BOTH `peer: true` AND `optional: true`. The peer-precedence guard MUST short-circuit m180's Optional classification so m178's PROVIDED_DEPENDENCY_OF wins per FR-006. The m178 peer-edge-targets annotation stamps on some-lib (the parent that declared the peer-optional dep).
